sections.content:
Both dots turned magenta. So it seems like all sky blue dots turn into magenta 2x2 squares when clicked. But wait, the color palette shows S, M, p, Y - maybe the dots cycle through these colors. Both first two became M (magenta). Let me continue clicking more dots to see if the pattern changes.
Actually, looking at the image, I see both dots are now magenta (pink). The remaining sky blue dots are still there. Let me continue clicking all the remaining sky blue dots. The goal might be to convert all of them.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click all remaining sky blue dots
remaining = [(37, 18), (41, 16), (54, 49), (55, 14), (56, 47), (57, 16)]
actions = [{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c} for r, c in remaining]
result = action(actions)
print("Result:", result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['color'] not in ('B', 'c', 'W'):
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
